summary: Completed frontend testing of admin panel reorganization. All 13 test objectives passed. P0 Email Templates fix verified, Forms tile+SlideOver layout verified, Page Content tile+grid layout verified, Branding & Hero merged section verified, AppFooter store_name fix verified.
passed_tests: Admin Website Content tab loads with 11 sidebar sections (Branding & Hero, Auth Pages, Forms, Checkout, Email Templates, Error Messages, Footer & Nav, Page Content, References, Payments, System Config)

Branding & Hero section contains: Store Name, Logo upload, Brand Colors (Primary/Accent), Store Hero Banner fields (label/title/subtitle), Articles Hero Banner fields (label/title/subtitle) - all merged in one section
No separate 'Store Hero' sidebar item exists (confirmed False)
Forms section: 3 tiles with correct data - Quote Request Form (5 fields), Scope Request Form (6 fields), Customer Sign-up Form (7 fields) with field count badges and pencil edit icons
Forms SlideOver: Quote form tile edit opens side panel with form title, subtitle, response time, FormSchemaBuilder with fields list
Forms SlideOver Save: Save button calls API, shows 'Saved' toast, and closes the panel
Page Content section: 7 tiles in 2-column grid (Checkout Success, Bank Transfer Success, 404 Not Found, GoCardless Callback, Verify Email, Customer Portal, Profile Page)
Page Content SlideOver: Checkout Success edit opens panel with page-specific fields (heading, paid msg, pending msg, expired msg, steps, portal link)
Email Templates section (P0 fix): Clicking 'Email Templates' renders full EmailSection component (Resend provider config, email toggle, 9 templates with Edit/toggle buttons, email logs accordion)

Email Templates API: GET /api/admin/email-templates returns exactly 9 templates (article_email, order_placed, password_reset, quote_request_admin, quote_request_customer, scope_request_admin, subscription_cancellation, subscription_created, verification)
Email template edit modal: Subject input populated, 7 variable chips visible ({{store_name}}, {{article_title}}, etc.), Rich Text/HTML Source/Preview tabs functional, Save Template button present
Save Changes button: Clicking it shows 'Settings saved' toast confirming branding+website settings save
AppFooter: Shows 'Automate Accounts' (store_name field) instead of hardcoded 'Brand' - bug fix confirmed
critical_code_review_comments: Two SlideOver components in WebsiteTab.tsx both have data-testid='slideover-panel' - this is fine functionally but makes automated testing slightly harder (querySelector returns first match). Consider unique testids like 'slideover-forms' and 'slideover-pages' in future iterations.
Variable chips selector (.bg-blue-50) also matches template 'Edit' buttons with same class - cosmetic selector issue only, not a functionality problem
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel reorganization is complete and fully functional. Email Templates P0 fix is verified. All 11 sidebar sections in Website Settings load correctly. Forms use tile+SlideOver layout. Page Content uses tile+grid layout. AppFooter shows store_name. Email Templates API returns 9 templates. No bugs found in this iteration.
